summary: The diff implements REQ-1 comprehensively. The HomePage redesign uses scroll-snap with snap-type y mandatory (via .snap-feed CSS utility), each card is sized to h-[calc(100dvh-4rem)] (full viewport minus header height) with snap-card class applying scroll-snap-align: start and scroll-snap-stop: always. The App.tsx layout uses h-dvh with overflow-hidden and flex-1 overflow-hidden for the Outlet, ensuring the header does not push card content out of view. VideoPostCard is redesigned with video filling the card (object-contain on black background) and overlaid UI elements. All acceptance criteria appear addressed.
